source_description: Sanitized Atom/OPDS-style XML catalog with two namespaces (Atom + dc). Exercises XML/namespace-aware parsing, attribute selection (link href/rel/type), and repeated entry elements. Intended for XPath / XML rule validation and local content parsing.
sanitization: All text and identifiers are synthetic ('Sanitized Demo Catalog', 'Sample Volume One', 'Corpus Bot'). Uses relative hrefs and urn:uuid identifiers. No real feed URL, no credentials, no copyrighted text.

privacy_check.notes: Synthetic catalog; no real publication data or credentials.
